prompt: No scratchpad spec or plan exists yet. This session narrowed a bug in `scripts/sync.sh` to a missing environment variable, but we are stopping before the fix. Use /save-session to save a continuation note for a future agent session.
assertions: Chooses the default path `.agents/scratchpad/save-session.md` when no feature-scoped scratchpad spec or plan is in context.
Invokes or explicitly follows addy-context-engineering before choosing what to preserve.
Captures the blocker or open question clearly enough for the next agent to resume.
Includes a concrete recommended next step instead of ending with a generic summary.
